name: Federal Reserve H.10 FX Rates
description: Real, individually-quoted foreign exchange rates from the U.S. Federal Reserve Board's H.10 Foreign Exchange Rates release, sourced for the marketdata.fx_driver_rates dataset (Cross-Rates Matrix driver input).

sources.name: Federal Reserve Board H.10 Foreign Exchange Rates
sources.description: Historical daily FX rate release pages, one per currency, each covering the full multi-year series.

datasets.name: FX Driver Rates 2016
datasets.description: 25 real Fed H.10 FX spot vintages across 2016 (start/end of each month, plus 2016-02-05 -- ORE's own bundled reference vintage date), a minimal USD-hub spanning tree over EUR/USD/GBP/CHF/JPY/SEK/AUD/CAD/NZD/ZAR/MXN/INR.
datasets.business_context: Cross-Rates Matrix driver input and synthetic FX market data seeding
